data.title: Appcast to Host Webinar on Strategic Healthcare Hiring
data.description: A free online session on April 21, 2026, in Lebanon, New Hampshire, will delve into using data-driven tactics to attract, interact with, and convert healthcare job seekers. With healthcare employers struggling with ongoing talent deficits, intense competition, and changing candidate expectations, this virtual event aims to provide insights and strategies for addressing these challenges. The session will cover innovative approaches aimed at connecting with and ultimately hiring prospective employees in the healthcare sector.

data.title: PEOPLES BANCORP INC. AND CITIZENS NATIONAL CORPORATION ANNOUNCE DEFINITIVE MERGER AGREEMENT
data.description: On April 21, 2026, it was announced that Peoples Bancorp Inc. (NASDAQ: PEBO) and Citizens National Corporation (OTCPK: CZNL) have entered into a definitive agreement and plan of merger. The merger agreement signifies a significant development in the financial sector, as two prominent institutions are joining forces. This merger is poised to greatly impact the financial landscape in Marietta, Ohio and Paintsville, Kentucky. Stay tuned for further updates as this merger progresses.

data.title: Ships near Strait of Hormuz targeted by scammers posing as Iranian officials, demanding Bitcoin or USDt for safe passage.
data.description: Numerous shipping companies near the Strait of Hormuz are facing a new threat as scammers pretending to be Iranian authorities are targeting them. These scammers are asking for payments in Bitcoin or USDt in exchange for ensuring the safety of passage through the area. This troubling development has alarmed many in the shipping industry, with a significant number of companies being affected by this illegal demand.

data.title: Click Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: CLIK) Launches Explosive Three-Year Silver Economy Drive: Targeting HK$500 Million Annual Revenue with ~100% CAGR via GBA Expansion & Silver Economy Tech Acquisition
data.description: In a recent press release on April 21, 2026, Click Holdings Limited, a company listed on NASDAQ under the symbol CLIK and based in Hong Kong, shared details of its ambitious three-year strategic plan spanning from 2026 to 2028. The organization, specializing in AI-driven human resources and senior care services, revealed its intentions to significantly enlarge and consolidate its top-tier senior care offerings through its renowned Care U brand. By executing this plan, Click Holdings aims to establish itself as the leading provider in the silver economy sector within Hong Kong and the Greater Bay Area.

data.title: PEOPLES BANCORP INC. DECLARES QUARTERLY DIVIDEND
data.description: On April 20, 2026, the Board of Directors of Peoples Bancorp Inc. (Nasdaq: PEBO) in Marietta, Ohio, announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.42 per common share. This marks a 2% increase from the previous dividend. The dividend is set to be paid on May 18, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May (exact date not mentioned).

data.title: LightMetrics Introduces ΦFP™: The AI Layer That Ensures Every Fleet Safety Alert Actually Matters
data.description: A cutting-edge cloud AI layer has been introduced to screen all driver safety alerts before forwarding them to a fleet manager. This advancement aims to tackle the issue of false alarms that have plagued driver monitoring technology, fostering distrust over the years. The technology was developed by LightMetrics, a prominent player in AI-driven video analytics software. The innovation was launched on April 21, 2026, in San Francisco, marking a significant step forward in enhancing driver monitoring efficiency. This breakthrough ensures that fleet managers receive only accurate alerts, contributing to improved fleet safety.

data.title: MedaSystems Introduces Next-Generation Enhancements to Transform User Experience
data.description: A technology company based in Menlo Park, California, MedaSystems, has unveiled a major update to its SaaS platform catering to Expanded Access (EA), Post-Trial Access (PTA), and Investigator-Initiated Studies (IIS). The new release brings an array of enhanced features and performance improvements aimed at boosting user experience, offering greater adaptability, and fostering improved collaboration. This move underscores MedaSystems' dedication to innovation, delivering increased control, efficiency, and collaboration tools to its clients.

data.title: Retail Technology Leader Jumpmind Hires Experienced Industry Leaders to Accelerate Global Expansion Across Europe, the Middle East and Asia Pacific
data.description: Jumpmind, a prominent retail technology solutions provider, has announced the addition of three experienced retail industry professionals to its management team in London. This strategic move aims to bolster Jumpmind's operations across Europe, the Middle East, and Asia Pacific as part of its global expansion. The enhanced team will support retailers looking to upgrade their in-store technology with Jumpmind's cloud-native, mobile-first point of service (POS) platform. This development highlights Jumpmind's international growth, catering to the increasing demand for modern retail solutions.

data.title: Docebo Announces Preliminary Unaudited Results for the Q1-2026 and Provides Updated Outlook for Fiscal Year 2026
data.description: In Toronto today, Docebo Inc. (NASDAQ: DCBO, TSX: DCBO) revealed preliminary (unaudited) financial results for Q1-2026. The company, known as the Enterprise Platform for the AI-era workforce, disclosed these results in U.S. dollars and following IFRS Measures. The first quarter, ending on March 31, 2026, saw promising numbers for Docebo as they aim to share the complete Q1-2026 financial report before the market opens.

data.title: Announcing VantaCon UK 2026: How AI is Rewriting Trust
data.description: In San Francisco today, Vanta, a top Agentic Trust Platform, revealed the speaker list for VantaCon UK 2026, the third annual UK community conference set for May 7 in London. This event will showcase keynotes, fireside talks, and interactive breakout sessions uniting security and AI specialists with the wider GRC community. To shape the future of GRC in the AI era, VantaCon will bring together CISOs, founders, and security executives from Synthesia, Intercom, Dashlane, etc.

data.title: Modern Treasury Partners with Persona to Enhance Business Onboarding and Compliance
data.description: In San Francisco, Modern Treasury has unveiled a new collaboration with Persona, aimed at bolstering legal entity screening features for businesses in the U.S. and worldwide. Through the incorporation of Persona’s identity validation and KYB processes, Modern Treasury is broadening its compliance framework to offer clients enhanced and adaptable onboarding solutions. As digital payments continue to integrate with software and AI advancements make it easier for malicious entities to operate, the necessity for robust compliance measures is growing.

data.title: GEn1E and Rubicon Research Announce Strategic Partnership to Advance AI-Driven Precision Immunomodulators
data.description: GEn1E Lifesciences Inc., a Phase 2 clinical-stage biotech company based in Palo Alto, California, has revealed a significant collaboration with Rubicon Research Limited and its U.S. branch, Validus Pharmaceuticals LLC. This partnership aims to advance AI-driven precision medications for immunology, inflammation, and rare diseases. GEn1E's distinctive GRID AI platform combines patient-centric, AI-fueled endotyping with comprehensive multi-omics and clinical information to pinpoint biologically distinct patient subsets.

data.title: Advanced Energy Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Date on May 4
data.description: Advanced Energy, a leading company in precision power solutions, will release its Q1 2026 financial results after the market closes on May 4, 2026. The management conference call is scheduled for 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day. Investors can join by dialing 877-407-0890 ten minutes before the call.
